<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after RIGHT x2
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blue = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
print(f"Blue: rows {blue['boundary'][0][0]}-{blue['boundary'][2][0]}, cols {blue['boundary'][0][1]}-{blue['boundary'][1][1]}")
green = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N'][0]
print(f"Timer: {green['pixels']}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over', False)}")

# Check if charcoal/magenta changed
c = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'c'][0]
m = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'M'][0]
print(f"Charcoal: pixels={c['pixels']}, boundary={c['boundary']}")
print(f"Magenta: pixels={m['pixels']}, boundary={m['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
